utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items with detailed subfields for each. The 'property' section lists type, bedrooms, bathrooms, location, price, currency, features, and availability date—all key details. The 'financing' section has method, down payment, interest rate, term, documentation, and schedule. The 'legal_services' section includes service name, features, costs, and availability. The 'moving_services' section has service level, cost, and inclusions. The 'setup_services' section lists utility setup cost, timeline, and included services. The 'total_budget' section summarizes all costs with a grand total. All items are fully specified with appropriate detail, meaning all six out of six are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a condo for purchase priced at CAD 782,000 with smart home and energy-efficient features, falling under the purchase_properties category. Among the ground-truth purchase properties, the closest match is 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD 750K), since it is the only one near that price range and fits the description of a modern/character property in a central location. For financing, the assistant includes both cash and mortgage options, which correspond to 'Cash Purchase' (rating 4) and 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9) in the purchase_financing section. The legal service selected is 'Basic Legal Package', rated 8. The survey cost (CAD 650) matches 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9). The moving service is labeled 'standard' with a cost of CAD 1200, which corresponds most closely to 'Premium Moving' (CAD 1200, rating 9) due to the identical price and full packing/unpacking features. The utility setup is described as 'basic' costing CAD 1200, which aligns best with 'Basic Utilities' (rating 5) given the naming and lower-tier nature, even though the price is higher than the ground-truth basic option.
